scripts.install:py: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync --project apps/api; else echo '[install:py] uv not found on PATH — skipping apps/api sync (install uv or add to PATH for local Python dev)'; fi
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter api dev"
